LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHIN LEUND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND THE MOTION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PER E-MAIL TO THE COURT THE CASE HAS BEEN DISMISSED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976
